name: Cheddar Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lean ground beef, grated cheddar cheese, soft bread crumbs, minced onion, Heinz 57 Sauce, and salt.
2. Form the mixture into 5 patties.
3. Grill or broil the patties to your desired level of doneness.
4. Serve in toasted sandwich buns.
5. Top with additional Heinz 57 Sauce if desired.
6. Makes 5 servings.
